example.name: FastAPI Framework

components.name: Core API Framework
components.purpose: Main FastAPI application framework providing API routing and request handling

example.architecture_md:
# FastAPI Architecture

FastAPI is a modern, fast web framework for building APIs with Python 3.6+ based on standard Python type hints.

## Core Components

- **Main Framework**: Core FastAPI class and application setup
- **Routing System**: Advanced API routing with dependency injection
- **Validation**: Automatic request/response validation using Pydantic

## Key Features

- High performance, comparable to NodeJS and Go
- Easy to use and learn
- Automatic API documentation generation
example.mermaid_modules:
graph TD
    A[fastapi/main.py] --> B[fastapi/routing.py]
    A --> C[fastapi/dependencies.py]
    B --> D[starlette]
example.mermaid_folders:
graph TD
    ROOT[fastapi]
    ROOT --> API[fastapi/]
    ROOT --> TESTS[tests/]
    ROOT --> DOCS[docs/]
example.mermaid_modules_simple:
graph TD
    A["🚀 FastAPI Core"] --> B["🛣️ Routing"]
    A --> C["✅ Validation"]
    B --> D["🌐 Starlette"]
example.mermaid_modules_balanced:
graph TD
    subgraph "FastAPI Framework"
        A[Main App] --> B[API Router]
        A --> C[Dependencies]
    end
    
    subgraph "External Libraries"
        D[Starlette]
        E[Pydantic]
    end
    
    B --> D
    C --> E
example.mermaid_modules_detailed:
graph TD
    A[fastapi/main.py] -->|"creates"| B[fastapi/routing.py]
    A -->|"manages"| C[fastapi/dependencies.py]
    A -->|"uses"| D[fastapi/params.py]
    B -->|"extends"| E[starlette/routing.py]
    C -->|"validates"| F[pydantic/BaseModel]
    A -->|"handles"| G[fastapi/exceptions.py]
example.description: Modern, fast web framework for building APIs with Python 3.6+ based on standard Python type hints
